---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new technology, scenario, shock profile, or model capability
title: "[feature] short description"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What you want

One or two sentences. Plain language.

## Why it matters

Who benefits? Which audience (researcher, grant reviewer, investor, operator) does this
serve?

## Where it would live

Which file or module would change? If you are not sure, that is fine.

## Sources for new quantitative claims

If your proposal involves a number (capex, opex, capacity factor, lifetime, etc.), link
to the public source. The project requires a citation in `report/references.md` for any
quantitative claim.

## Alternatives considered

Briefly: what other shapes did you consider, and why is this one preferred?

## Notes

Anything else useful for triage.
